title: Basic JavaScript this Binding Patterns
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript this Binding Patterns. Focus on implementing Default binding (global/window) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript this Binding Patterns
description: Create a function that uses Default binding (global/window) and Implicit binding (method call) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript this Binding Patterns Project
description: Build a small application that applies Default binding (global/window), Implicit binding (method call), Explicit binding (call, apply, bind) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript this Binding Patterns
description: The following code has bugs related to Default binding (global/window). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript this Binding Patterns
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Default binding (global/window) and Implicit binding (method call).
